name: a6_contract_drift_cli_retry2_20260421
outcome_goal: Every contract under contracts/ and runtime/*_contract.py has a producer-to-consumer round-trip test; drift cases are filed as bugs.

jobs.label: a6_contract_drift
jobs.prompt: Audit typed-contract drift. Targets: Code&DBs/Workflow/contracts/domain.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/contracts/data_contracts.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/dependency_contract.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/build_planning_contract.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/topology_contract.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/workflow/submission_contract.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/adapters/provider_types.py. For each contract, name producer, consumer, serialization boundary, current tests, missing coverage, drift risks. Add focused round-trip tests where scope is clear; file bugs contract-drift::<contract> where broader fixes are needed. Transport constraint: use CLI only; do not use Anthropic API or any llm_task route.
